steps.title: Find the sentence boundary
steps.content: The first clause ends after the veins provide structural support. The next clause begins with a modifying phrase, then uses 'these veins' as its subject and 'allow' as its verb.

steps.title: Separate the clauses
steps.content: B fuses the structures without punctuation. C and D use commas where a full sentence break is needed. A period after 'support' correctly separates the complete thought before 'Decreasing' begins the modifier. The answer is A.
